creator: andrew@milojah.org
text:
I read the wrong part number off of the box, this is the dmesg string  
for the card:

atapci3: <SiI 3512 SATA150 controller> port  
0xcc00-0xcc07,0xc880-0xc883,0xc800-0xc807,0xc480-0xc483,0xc400-0xc40f  
mem 0xfaaffc00-0xfaaffdff irq 16 at device 8.0 on pci4


Also, it appears to hang when dd-ing from a cd to /dev/null. There is  
another open ticket for a hang related to a similar chipset when used  
with a harddisk.

Thanks
